about.title: About Al-Hamer Hobby
about.subtitle: A Legacy of Passion Since 1976
about.p1: Established in 1976, Al-Hamer Hobby has been Kuwait's most trusted destination for remote control enthusiasts. For nearly five decades, we have served hobbyists of all ages with the finest RC planes, cars, helicopters, and accessories from world-renowned brands.
about.p2: Our commitment to quality extends beyond just selling products. We provide expert advice, genuine spare parts, and after-sales support to keep your hobby alive and thriving. From beginners taking their first flight to seasoned racers pushing the limits, Al-Hamer Hobby is your partner in every adventure.
about.p3: Located in the heart of Kuwait, we continue to bring the latest innovations in RC technology to the Gulf region, upholding our reputation for excellence and passion.
